_meta.scope: Base-game global + party achievements (scenarios 1-95). Forgotten Circles achievements are NOT included here; see caveats and add via a forgotten-circles pass when requested.
_meta.spoiler_policy: ALL achievements are story spoilers (spoiler:true). Never surface earned_by/effect/name in chat unless the linked content is already unlocked in state/campaign.json.
_meta.rules_note: Only one global achievement of a given Type can be active at a time; a new one replaces the old. Stackable globals (Ancient Technology, End of Corruption) are counters (x2/x3...). End of Corruption x3 gates scenario 51.
_meta.caveats: Sourced from the open-source Gloomhaven Storyline tracker + Fandom, not line-by-line from the physical book; treat exact gold/event-card numbers as tracker-derived. The Drake (Slain/Aided) and The Voice (Freed/Silenced) are modeled as branch-exclusive though the rulebook may not print them as a formal shared Type. Forgotten Circles (sc. 96-117) adds globals: Through the Portal, Knowledge is Power (x2-4), A Peril Averted (x2-4), Pieces of an Artifact (x2-3), Mechanical Splendor, Severed Ties; and party achievements: Angels of Death, Custodians, Hunted Prey, Guard Detail, Dimensional Equilibrium, Hunting the Hunter, Xangroth's Aid, Diamara's Aid, Beauty in Freedom — intentionally omitted here.

global_achievements.name: The Merchant Flees
global_achievements.effect: Jekserah flees; gates scenario 20; its absence enables the 9/Diamond Mine branch.

global_achievements.name: The Dead Invade
global_achievements.effect: Triggers undead invasion; its absence allows scenario 8 on that branch.

global_achievements.name: City Rule: Economic
global_achievements.effect: City faction = Economic. Mutually exclusive City Rule track.

global_achievements.name: City Rule: Militaristic
global_achievements.effect: City faction = Militaristic. Mutually exclusive City Rule track.

global_achievements.name: City Rule: Demonic
global_achievements.effect: City faction = Demonic; gates 45/49/50. Mutually exclusive City Rule track.

global_achievements.name: End of the Invasion
global_achievements.effect: Ends invasion line; its absence required to still access 11/12.

global_achievements.name: The Power of Enhancement
global_achievements.effect: Unlocks Enhancements mechanic; gates 7/19/31/43.

global_achievements.name: The Rift Neutralized
global_achievements.effect: Closes elemental rift; its absence gates 10/21/35/36.

global_achievements.name: The Artifact: Recovered
global_achievements.effect: Artifact recovered; gates 31. Mutually exclusive Artifact track.

global_achievements.name: The Artifact: Recovered (previously Lost)
global_achievements.earned_by: Complete scenario 21 after artifact was Lost.
global_achievements.effect: Recovers a previously lost artifact; gates 31. Artifact track.

global_achievements.name: The Artifact: Lost
global_achievements.effect: Artifact lost; its absence required for scenario 27. Artifact track.

global_achievements.name: Artifact: Cleansed
global_achievements.effect: Final artifact status; advances main story. Artifact track.

global_achievements.name: Ancient Technology
global_achievements.effect: Accumulates charges; unlocks reward at thresholds.

global_achievements.name: The Edge of Darkness
global_achievements.effect: Advances the Gloom storyline toward endgame.

global_achievements.name: The Drake Slain
global_achievements.earned_by: Complete scenario 34 by killing the drake.
global_achievements.effect: Drake dead. Mutually exclusive with The Drake Aided.

global_achievements.name: The Drake Aided
global_achievements.earned_by: Aid (not kill) the drake at scenario 34.
global_achievements.effect: Drake becomes ally. Mutually exclusive with The Drake Slain.

global_achievements.name: The Voice Freed
global_achievements.effect: Frees the Voice; its absence gates 42. Exclusive with The Voice Silenced.

global_achievements.name: The Voice Silenced
global_achievements.effect: Silences the Voice. Exclusive with The Voice Freed.

global_achievements.name: Water-Breathing
global_achievements.effect: Party breathes underwater; gates 26/37/64 (and FC 88).

global_achievements.name: End of Corruption
global_achievements.effect: Reduces corruption; x3 required to access scenario 51.

global_achievements.name: Annihilation of Order
global_achievements.effect: Its absence gates scenario 50.

global_achievements.name: End of Gloom
global_achievements.effect: Defeat of the Gloom; canonical end of the main campaign.

party_achievements.name: The Voice's Treasure
party_achievements.earned_by: Complete scenario 33, take the Voice's treasure.

party_achievements.name: The Drake's Treasure
party_achievements.earned_by: Complete scenario 33, take the Drake's treasure.
party_achievements.effect: Drake branch; enables aiding the drake at 34.

party_achievements.name: Sun-Blessed
party_achievements.effect: Prerequisite for sun-related side content (exact gate unconfirmed).
